titleStmt.title: SII 40.321: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 321. (A.R. No. B. 369 of 1933.) Mōraguḍi, Jammalamadugu Taluk, Cuddapah District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a mutilated stone lying in the compound of the Chennakēśava temple.

Beginning lost. Records the gift of Vipravinōdivartana of the agrahāra (name lost) by some members of the Vipravinōdi community for the hunting festival (Pārivēṭa-mahōtsava) of the god Chennakēśava-Perumāḷ on the Saṅkrānti days, on the occasion of solar eclipse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kaṁsīlōśō nahajanālakunnu kāsya
lāyanasūtra prathamaśākhyāyi Aina vipravinō
llabhayyagāri putṛṁḍaina parvatayarunnu pedagōviṁdayyagāri
putṛḍu gōviṁdayyagārunnu rudrayyagāri komāruḍu gōviṁdayya
nayya komāruṁḍu parvatayyagārunnu nallārayya cinaṁttayyagā
runu Icina silāśāsanaṁ Agrahārānanū vipravinōdulavarta
nalu Ī cennakēśvara perumāḷlaku mā vipravinōdikulaṁ vāriki Aṁdarki puṇya
ṁgānu sūryagrahaṇa puṇyakālamaṁddu saṁkrāṁtti pārivēṁṭa ma
hōtsavānaku dhāravosi Istimi yī mahōtsavaṁmāṁṭa tappakuṁṭa
nu dhāravōsi Istimi vipravinōdhivāri Aṁddariki daṁḍaṁ sama
rppiṁcci Istimi trivācakaṁgānu dhāravōsi Iccina dharmmaśāsanamu
Iṁduku yavvaru vakraṁ sēsinanu tappinānu tama talli taṁḍrini vā
raṇāsilōnu vadhiṁccina pāpānapōduru mātrugamanaṁ sēsināru
cēsinavāru śunakamāṁsaṁ bhakṣiṁccinavāru I dharmaśāsa
tappivarttana Aḍiginānu kulācārānaku veli svadattā dvigu
nupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ
kovintayaḻ ta°tri
Eśuttu
Digital edition of SII 40.321 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
